locations.name: Tandridge
locations.description: Caterham front counter is now closed. Your nearest Surrey Police counter will be Reigate or Epsom. A yellow phone will remain at the location which can be used to reach police directly.
locations.address:
Please visit the Surrey Police website at www.surrey.police.uk to contact your local team or to
•	report crime and other incidents to us
•	obtain advice and information
•	request our services
•	give us feedback
•	find your nearest police station
